signal: 记忆整合 cron (320cca06) failed with 'Edit: in SOUL.md (26 chars) failed'. Root cause: consolidation agent tried to add content that already existed in SOUL.md (2026-03-18 反思 section). Idempotent edit failure — the desired content is present, but the cron reported error.
action: Cron prompt updated: added edit idempotency + read-before-edit + one retry on oldText mismatch. Goal: avoid turning no-op SOUL.md updates into cron errors. Verify on next run (2026-03-22 03:00).
evidence_160: 记忆整合 cron payload updated with explicit edit-tool rules (idempotency).
evidence_161: No new 记忆整合 run yet (next: 2026-03-22 03:00). Still open pending verification.

signal: Nested lane concurrency bug: maxConcurrentRuns=5 was no-op because cron jobs route to 'nested' lane (default maxConcurrent=1), not 'cron' lane. 昊辰 did deep source-code investigation. Patch applied but fragile — every openclaw update overwrites it.
action: (1) Grounded as reference: memory/reference/nested-lane-patch.md with full reproduction details, patch instructions, and post-update checklist. (2) Noted in project-check work item for post-update re-verification.
evidence_158: Patch active ([lane-patch] confirmed in today's log). Zero 'lane wait exceeded' errors today — previously a recurring problem. Strong positive signal.
evidence_160: No 'lane wait exceeded' / candidates.json / ENOENT matches in today's gateway log grep. Patch assumed still active; re-verify after any openclaw update.
evidence_161: Patch confirmed active 2026-03-20. Zero lane-wait errors in today's log. 3 clean cycles — marking converge-candidate but keeping open because patch is fragile (any openclaw update resets it).

signal: feed-score cron agent tries data/candidates.json at wrong paths (skill dir or workspace dir) before reading SKILL.md and cd'ing to repo. Causes ENOENT errors in gateway log at 14:45, 18:45, 20:45 CST. Root cause: cron prompt had redundant early-exit check that ran before skill was loaded.
action: Simplified feed-score cron prompt: removed redundant early-exit file check, delegated to SKILL.md Step 1 which cd's to repo first. Agent now always reads skill before touching files.
evidence_160: No ENOENT/candidates.json matches found in today's gateway log after cron prompt simplification.
evidence_161: Zero candidates.json ENOENT on 2026-03-20. Pre-fix errors stopped after 20:45 CST on 3/19. 5+ successful feed-score runs post-fix (00:45, 02:45, 04:45, 06:45, 08:45) with no path confusion. 2 clean PCEC cycles. One more for convergence.

signal: 7 daily ENOENT gateway ERRORs from cron agents calling read tool on memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md before the file exists. Agents without lightContext follow AGENTS.md 'Every Session: read daily logs' instruction, but overnight the daily log hasn't been created yet. ~7 false-positive ERRORs per night.
action: Added daily-log existence guard to heartbeat-check.sh: `[ -f $DL ] || touch $DL`. Heartbeat runs every 30 min, so the file will exist within 30 min of midnight. Prevents all subsequent ENOENT errors for the day.
